transcript_text:
[Ananya Reddy]: Hello, thank you for calling. How can I help?
[Customer]: My internet is down since yesterday.
[Ananya Reddy]: I am sorry to hear that. Let me check.
[Customer]: Please be quick.
[Ananya Reddy]: I have raised a ticket for you. Engineer will visit by 6 PM.

[Rahul Sharma]: Good morning, how can I assist?
[Customer]: My recharge failed but money got deducted.
[Rahul Sharma]: Let me look up your account. Can I have your registered number?
[Customer]: 9876543210.
[Rahul Sharma]: I see the failed transaction. Refund will reflect in 5 working days.

Hi Kavita,
Thanks for reaching out about your delayed order #45221. I have just spoken with our logistics partner and your package will arrive by Thursday. As an apology, I have added a 10 percent voucher to your account valid for 30 days. Please write back if anything else is unclear.
Best, Meera

[Priya Iyer]: Hi! I see you are facing trouble logging in. Have you tried resetting your password?
[Customer]: Yes, but the reset email never came.
[Priya Iyer]: Got it. Let me trigger it manually from our end. Please check your spam folder too.
[Customer]: Got it now, thanks!
[Priya Iyer]: Wonderful, anything else I can help with?

[Vikram Singh]: Hello, what do you want?
[Customer]: I want to cancel my account.
[Vikram Singh]: Fine, just give me your card number and I will close it.
[Customer]: Why do you need my card number?
[Vikram Singh]: To verify, just tell me.

[Karan Patel]: What now?
[Customer]: My bill seems wrong.
[Karan Patel]: Read it properly. It is correct.
[Customer]: I have read it three times.
[Karan Patel]: Then you do not understand it. Goodbye.

Hi Aarav,
Thanks for the note. I see your refund of 1499 INR is pending review. I have escalated it to our finance team and you should see it credited within 3 working days. I will follow up if there is any delay on our side.
Regards, Sneha

[Arjun Nair]: Hi, I can help with that.
[Customer]: My device is heating up after the latest update.
[Arjun Nair]: That is annoying. Try a soft restart and let me know if it persists.
[Customer]: Did that, still heats up.
[Arjun Nair]: Okay, I am raising a service request for inspection. You will get the details by SMS.

[Ananya Reddy]: Yeah hi.
[Customer]: Mumble mumble subscription mumble.
[Ananya Reddy]: Okay, sure.
[Customer]: So that is fine?
[Ananya Reddy]: Yes that should be fine I think.

[Rahul Sharma]: Hello, how can I help?
[Customer]: I want to upgrade my plan.
[Rahul Sharma]: Sure, you currently have the 199 plan. The next tier is 349 with double data.
[Customer]: Okay, please switch me.
[Rahul Sharma]: Done, you will get a confirmation message shortly.
